parsed.production_notes: Combines live-action footage of human actors with an AI-generated avatar. The avatar exhibits typical AI traits like perfectly smooth skin, minimal facial movement, and slightly unnatural lip-syncing.

characters.appearance: Mid-20s, slim build, medium complexion, long black hair. Expressive facial features.
Mid-20s, medium build, medium complexion, curly black hair, slight mustache.
Mid-20s, slim build, medium complexion, short black hair. Wears glasses.
characters.wardrobe: Black long-sleeve shirt and dark pants.

characters.appearance: Young adult female, slim build, fair complexion, long wavy dark hair. Wears a small bindi.

scenes.setting: Outdoor paved courtyard, daytime, auto-rickshaw and trash bins in background.

panels.panel_visual_description: A young woman stands facing two young men who are seated with their backs partially to the camera. She gestures confidently with her hands while speaking. The men look up at her. The background features a paved area, some greenery, an auto-rickshaw, and brightly colored trash bins.

scenes.visual_description: A young woman stands facing two young men who are seated with their backs partially to the camera. She gestures confidently with her hands while speaking. The men look up at her. The background features a paved area, some greenery, an auto-rickshaw, and brightly colored trash bins.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: ippol English edan na kalakki chirikkanamada, 15 days on this app, now I can speak better English than you guys. [Now laugh at my English, 15 days on this app, now I can speak better English than you guys.]
Character C says: Just 15 days? Wow, very fluent English! [Just 15 days? Wow, very fluent English!]
Character B says: Adhe enna aap pannuradhu? [What app is that?]
scenes.on_screen_text: ippol English edan na kalakki chirikkanamada, 15 days on this app, now I can speak than you guys. Just 15 days? Wow, very fluent English! Adhe enna aap pannuradhu?

scenes.setting: Outdoor paved courtyard / Abstract studio background.

panels.panel_visual_description: The scene starts with the woman talking to the men outdoors, then cuts to a full-screen view of a smartphone displaying an AI-generated woman in a red saree. The AI woman is centered in the frame, looking directly at the camera with a neutral, pleasant expression.

scenes.visual_description: The scene starts with the woman talking to the men outdoors, then cuts to a full-screen view of a smartphone displaying an AI-generated woman in a red saree. The AI woman is centered in the frame, looking directly at the camera with a neutral, pleasant expression.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: SpeakX app, ithu AI English teaching app aanu, ithu nammal English padikkan help cheyyunnu. [SpeakX app, this is an AI English teaching app, it helps us learn English.]

scenes.setting: Indoor room, textured beige wall, daytime.

panels.panel_visual_description: The young woman is seen indoors, standing in profile against a textured wall. She holds a smartphone up to her mouth, speaking into it, and then looks down at the screen, smiling slightly.

scenes.visual_description: The young woman is seen indoors, standing in profile against a textured wall. She holds a smartphone up to her mouth, speaking into it, and then looks down at the screen, smiling slightly.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: Ningal time waste cheythirunnappol njan daily 10-15 minute English practice cheythirunnu. [While you were wasting time, I was practicing English for 10-15 minutes daily.]
scenes.on_screen_text: Ningal time waste cheythirunnappol njan daily 10-15 minute English practice cheythirunnu.

panels.panel_visual_description: The young woman is back outdoors, facing the two men. She holds her phone in one hand and uses her other hand to gesture as she explains something. The men listen attentively. She then looks down at her phone and invites them to look at it.

scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: ithoru AI teacher aanu, samsarikkumbolo allenkil mistakes cheyyumbolo enikku oru pedi illa karanam enthu mistakes cheythalum ithu udane correct cheythu tharunnu. Varu, Oru ee appilokum [This is an AI teacher, I have no fear when speaking or making mistakes because whatever mistakes I make, it corrects them immediately. Come, look at this app.]

scenes.setting: Split screen: Abstract studio / Outdoor courtyard.

panels.panel_visual_description: An AI-generated woman with long dark hair, wearing a red saree and a bindi, faces forward with a pleasant, static smile. The background is a plain, light color.

Three young adults (one woman, two men) stand close together outdoors, looking down at a smartphone held by the woman. They appear engaged and interested in what is on the screen. The background shows a paved area and a modern building.

scenes.visual_description: A vertical split-screen shows the AI avatar on the left and the three friends interacting with a phone on the right. The AI avatar speaks directly to the viewer, while the friends on the right seem to be listening to the phone.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character B says: Hello ma'am, njangellam English samsarikkan padikkanu. [Hello ma'am, we are all learning to speak English.]
Character D says: Sheri. ningalude free time-il ente koode English samsarikkan practice thudangoo. Rahul-inepole ningaludeyum English 15 muthal 20 divasathinullil fluent aayi maarum. [Okay. Start practicing speaking English with me in your free time. Like Rahul, your English will also become fluent within 15 to 20 days.]
scenes.on_screen_text: Hello ma'am, njangellam English samsarikkan padikkanu. Sheri. ningalude free time-il ente koode English samsarikkan practice thudangoo. Rahul-inepole ningaludeyum English 15 muthal 20 divasathinullil fluent aayi maarum.

scenes.setting: Outdoor paved walkway, daytime, modern buildings in background.

panels.panel_visual_description: The three friends walk side-by-side towards the camera along a paved outdoor walkway. The woman is in the middle, holding her phone. The men walk on either side of her. They are engaged in conversation, looking at each other and smiling.

scenes.visual_description: The three friends walk side-by-side towards the camera along a paved outdoor walkway. The woman is in the middle, holding her phone. The men walk on either side of her. They are engaged in conversation, looking at each other and smiling.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character B says: Wow, Ee Ai Teacher nallathallo, enikkum arshan pole English vedi. [Wow, this AI teacher is good, I also want to learn English like Arshan.]
Character A says: Ee appu jeevitham maatti, ippol ellavarum enikku respect tharunnundu, SpeakX download cheyyu. [This app changed my life, now everyone respects me, download SpeakX.]
scenes.on_screen_text: Wow, Ee Ai Teacher nallathallo, enikkum arshan pole English vedi. Ee appu jeevitham maatti, ippol ellavarum enikku respect tharunnundu, SpeakX download cheyyu.
